revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''1-2-295

(Wet) Dock

Harbour or basin which is closed against the tidal range and which provides cargo-handling facilities for ships.


Note: In the U.S.A. the space between two piers which is not closed against the tidal range is also called a dock.

{{IALAFooter}}
